name: One Stop Pawn Shop
description_short: 1 Stop Pawn Shop is a West Memphis, AR-based firearms and outdoor gear retailer offering in-house retail financing with APRs from 15.99-23.99% on purchases from $500+.
description_long:
1 Stop Pawn Shop operates as a specialized firearms and outdoor equipment retailer located in West Memphis, Arkansas. While categorized as a pawn shop, the available website content reveals a retail operation focused on selling new and used firearms, ammunition, optics, knives, and tactical gear rather than traditional pawn lending against collateral. The business maintains an e-commerce platform and accepts retail financing applications.

The company's primary offering is a retail financing program administered through U.S. Credit, Inc., enabling customers to finance purchases of $500 or more at fixed APRs between 15.99% and 23.99% (based on FICO score) over 18-48 month terms. They offer a "Special Financing" or same-as-cash option for purchases $1,000+ with no interest if paid in full within a promotional period. Financing requires credit approval, and customers can maintain up to two open loans simultaneously with a 60-day approval window to utilize credit.

1 Stop Pawn Shop distinguishes itself through an extensive product catalog spanning firearms categories (handguns, rifles, shotguns, lower receivers), ammunition, optical equipment (scopes, red dots, night vision, thermal), tactical gear (body armor, holsters, mag pouches), knives, and survival supplies. The retailer appears to cater to firearms enthusiasts, hunters, and tactical operators rather than general consumers. Their financing structure includes no application fees, no money down requirements, and no prepayment penalties.

The business model relies on retail financing rather than traditional collateral-based pawning. The financing program carries moderate-to-high interest rates typical of non-prime consumer lending. Customer service is limited to email and phone contact, with no apparent physical storefront information provided on the website.
pros: No application fees or money-down requirement for financing
No prepayment penalties — customers can pay off contracts early without cost
Special Financing (0% interest) available on qualifying purchases $1,000+ if paid in full during promotional period
Fixed-rate contracts that don't fluctuate during loan term
Extended financing terms up to 48 months available based on purchase amount
Extensive firearms and tactical gear inventory with detailed product categorization
APR rates (15.99-23.99%) disclosed upfront and tied to FICO score
cons: APR range of 15.99-23.99% is significantly higher than traditional personal loans and bank financing
Special Financing promotion is voided if any payment is 15+ days late, creating all-or-nothing risk
Approved credit is non-revolving and must be used within 60 days or new application required
Limited customer service options (email and phone only; no apparent physical location details)
Not all buyers qualify for financing; eligibility entirely dependent on credit approval
best_for: Firearms enthusiasts and hunters needing to finance tactical or hunting equipment purchases
Customers with fair-to-good credit (FICO-dependent pricing) seeking installment financing for specialty gear
Buyers of high-value items ($1,000+) who can commit to promotional period payoff for 0% interest
diagnosis: 1 Stop Pawn Shop is best for firearms and tactical gear buyers with fair-to-good credit who need installment financing and accept moderate-to-high APRs. The critical caveat is that Special Financing promotions are high-risk (forfeiture if any payment is 15+ days late) and APRs of 15.99-23.99% are substantially more expensive than traditional personal loans—suitable only for buyers without prime credit access.
services: Retail installment financing (15.99-23.99% APR, 18-48 month terms)
Firearm sales (handguns, rifles, shotguns, lower receivers, black powder)
Ammunition sales (rifle, handgun, shotgun, bulk, specialty)
Optical equipment sales (scopes, red dots, night vision, thermal, binoculars)
Tactical gear and accessories (body armor, holsters, concealed carry purses, mag pouches)
Knife sales (fixed blade, folding, out-the-front, utility)
Parts and accessories sales (triggers, barrels, conversion kits, reloading equipment)
Suppressors and NFA item sales (AOW, short-barreled rifles, machine guns)
Hunting and outdoor gear (blinds, tree stands, trail cameras, decoys, game calls)
Gun storage solutions (hard cases, soft cases, safes, security equipment)
